name: stack-orchestrator-mcp
description: Multi-stack execution orchestrator. Parses stack.compose.toml, builds dependency graphs, plans phased parallel execution, and dispatches steps to per-domain LSP cartridges (cloud-lsp, container-lsp, database-lsp, k8s-lsp, git-lsp, iac-lsp, observe-lsp, queues-lsp, secrets-lsp, ssg-lsp, proof-lsp). Replaces 'fleet-mcp redesign' working name per ADR-002.

tools.name: stack_parse
tools.description: Parse a stack.compose.toml file into structured representation. Returns component graph, dependency edges, and security policies.

content.description: Inline TOML content (mutually exclusive with path)

tools.name: stack_plan
tools.description: Build an execution plan from a parsed stack. Validates the dependency graph for cycles, topologically sorts components, groups into parallel phases, and routes each step to a target LSP cartridge.

stack.description: Parsed stack object returned by stack_parse

tools.name: stack_execute_phase
tools.description: Execute a single phase of a plan. Calls into the target LSP cartridges via their loopback ports.

dry_run.description: If true, no LSPs are invoked; returns the dispatch matrix only

tools.name: stack_rollback
tools.description: Reverse-execute the steps of a partially-executed plan, respecting the rollback_strategy declared in the stack.

to_phase.description: Roll back to (and including) this phase. -1 = rollback to clean state.

tools.name: stack_verify
tools.description: Run the [verification] block of the stack against the deployed components.
